task_completion.description: Navigate to the Resources module in CAMEO Data Manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CAMEO Data Manager application is open with the 'Resources' section or list visible.

task_completion.description: Enter the hospital name in the resource form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Memorial Hermann Southeast Hospital' is visible in the Name or Organization field of a resource record.

task_completion.description: Enter the street address, city, state, and zip code
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address fields contain '11800 Astoria Blvd', 'Houston', 'TX', and '77089'.

task_completion.description: Enter the phone number and contact name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The phone field contains '(713) 222-2323' and the contact name field contains 'Emergency Department Director'.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified notes about the facility
task_completion.visual_evidence: The notes or description field contains the text 'Level III Trauma Center. Primary receiving facility for chemical incidents from Clear Lake industrial area. Equipped with decontamination facilities.'
The resource record is shown in a saved/view mode, or appears in the list of saved resources in the CAMEO Data Manager.

integrity.description: The agent used the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CAMEO Data Manager application windows and forms being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual CAMEO Data Manager application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the specific fields of the CAMEO Data Manager software, not a generic text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to manipulate the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots showing SQLite or other database command-line interfaces being used to insert the record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Memorial Hermann Southeast Hospital is a real facility located at 11800 Astoria Blvd, Houston, TX 77089. It is a Level III Emergency and Trauma Center. Note: The agent must use the exact details provided in the task description, including the phone number (713) 222-2323, even though the real hospital's main number is different.
